blended.narrative: Poley Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,411 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
